name: Covert Action Team
description: Elite special operations unit trained for clandestine direct action, sabotage, personnel recovery, and unconventional warfare behind enemy lines. Operates with minimal footprint and plausible deniability.

specialAbilities.name: Infrastructure Sabotage
specialAbilities.description: Can covertly destroy or disable critical enemy infrastructure including bridges, power plants, and command posts.

specialAbilities.name: Plausible Deniability
specialAbilities.description: Operations are conducted with no traceable link to the sponsoring nation, avoiding diplomatic repercussions.
